day2_morning_start.name: Me
day2_morning_start.text: *The alarm wakes me. Day 2. Less nervous than yesterday.*

day2_morning_2.name: Me
day2_morning_2.text: *I check my phone. Old school friends... still no messages. My texts in the group chat show 'Read by 0.'*

day2_morning_3.name: Me
day2_morning_3.text: *I arrive at the school gate and... Sea is standing there.*

day2_morning_sea_wait.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_sea_wait.text: "Oh, hey. I waited a bit so we could walk together."

day2_morning_sea_2.name: Me
day2_morning_sea_2.text: "Waiting? How did you know what time I'd come..."

day2_morning_sea_3.name: Me
day2_morning_sea_3.text: *Instead of answering, Sea linked her arm with mine and headed to class. ...I came 10 minutes earlier than usual today.*

day2_morning_classroom.name: Park Eunsu
day2_morning_classroom.text: "{name}, how was your first day yesterday? Nothing uncomfortable?"

day2_morning_eunsu_1.name: Me
day2_morning_eunsu_1.text: "Everyone was nice, so it went well."

day2_morning_eunsu_2.name: Park Eunsu
day2_morning_eunsu_2.text: "That's good. By the way, {name}, you haven't gotten any contact from your previous school, right?"

day2_morning_eunsu_3.name: Me
day2_morning_eunsu_3.text: *...Why would she ask that? Probably just checking in.*

day2_morning_seolhwa.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa.text: *Sitting down, I glance behind me. Seolhwa is... still there. Same seat, same expression.*

day2_morning_seolhwa_2.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_2.text: *What that guy said yesterday about it being an 'empty seat' keeps bugging me. I snuck a peek at the attendance sheet...*

day2_morning_seolhwa_3.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_3.text: *Strange. There's no name listed for the back seat. The headcount doesn't seem to add up either... Did I miscount?*

day2_morning_end.name: Me
day2_morning_end.text: *Let's focus on class. It's only Day 2.*
